description_long: This is a pair of compact scissors featuring stainless steel blades and ergonomic plastic handles. The handles are predominantly light blue with yellow inner rings, providing a comfortable and secure grip. The blades are joined by a visible central rivet, ensuring smooth pivoting action. The finger loops are symmetrical and rounded, with soft-looking yellow inserts for added comfort. The blade tips are rounded for safety, making these scissors suitable for general use, including in environments with children. There is a visible brand marking etched onto the metal near the pivot point.
description: Small scissors with blue and yellow ergonomic handles and rounded safety tips, joined by a central rivet and featuring a visible brand marking.
description_view_0: Front view showing both blue handles with yellow inserts and the full length of the stainless steel blades.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blades and the thickness of the plastic handles.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the handles and blades from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the layered construction of the handles.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, ergonomic, ambidextrous handles with blue plastic exterior and yellow soft inner rings for enhanced grip.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard fixed pivot design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two equal-sized, rounded loops with yellow soft inserts, designed for comfort and suitable for either hand.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Rounded safety tips, designed to prevent accidental injury and suitable for general or child-safe use.
attribute_brand_marking: There is a visible brand marking etched on the metal near the pivot point.
